pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring newer bytecode versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.xml.bind:jaxb-api with jakarta.xml.bind:jakarta.xml.bind-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and is not available in Java 21; using the Jakarta namespace is required for modern JAXB implementations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jaxws-rt dependency to provide JAX-WS implementation removed from the JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAX-WS APIs and implementations were removed from the JDK in Java 11; explicit dependency is required for runtime functionality in Java 21.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Pass.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Pass.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Role.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Role.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/request/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/request/.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/custom/mu.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/custom/mu.why_exists: String.formatted is not available in Java 8; this change requires Java 15+ to compile.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/custom/mu.general_idea: Replace Paths.get with Path.of introduced in Java 11.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/custom/mu.why_exists: Path.of is not available in Java 8; this change requires Java 11+ to compile.
